creator: xmj@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hello,

Per https://spark.apache.org/downloads.html, the most recent version is up to 3.2.

So the patch attached here can be ignored, it's three years old and I lost interest after this did not move within the first six months.

I might take a stab at it to see if generating a new patch would be easy to do, but cannot promise anything at this point.

Best,
-xmj
